title: Plan with Claude Opus, Build with Kimi K2.6? LIVE Mixed-Provider Benchmark
summary: Cole Medin benchmarks mixed-provider LLM workflows by assigning Claude Opus and Kimi K2.6 to different pipeline stages (planning vs. implementation) and evaluating all combinations against real GitHub issues. The experiment measures code quality, correctness, and plan fidelity across seven dimensions using an Opus-based evaluator.
